errors.enter_admin_credentials: Enter your admin username and password above first

errors.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

Delete this DM?

channels.organize_desc: Reorder channels and assign category tags
channels.no_webhooks: No webhooks yet. Create one above.

channels.create_temp_channel_hint: Enter a name for the temp channel

errors.not_a_member: Not a member of this channel

errors.media_disabled: Media uploads are disabled in this channel

errors.no_create_channels: You don't have permission to create channels
errors.no_kick: You don't have permission to kick users
errors.no_ban: You don't have permission to ban users
errors.no_mute: You don't have permission to mute users

errors.no_delete_messages: You don't have permission to delete messages
errors.no_pin_messages: You don't have permission to pin messages

slowmode.wait: Slow mode — wait {{seconds}}s before sending another message
slowmode.muted_for: You are muted for {{minutes}} more minute(s)

welcome.title: Welcome to Haven
welcome.subtitle:
Join a channel with a code from your friends,
or create one if you're the admin.

header.update_title: Haven v{{remote}} is available (you have v{{local}}). Click to view.

media.spotify_volume_hint: Use Spotify's built-in controls for volume
media.uploads_disabled: Media uploads are disabled in this channel

users.no_bio: No bio yet — click Edit Profile to add one
users.nickname_hint: Only you will see this nickname for {{name}}.

context.flash_not_installed: Flash games not installed (~37 MB download)
context.flash_install_result: Flash games: {{installed}} installed, {{already}} already had, {{errors}} failed

voice_settings.noise_mode_hint: Off = no processing, Gate = silence below threshold, Suppress = AI noise removal (RNNoise)

image_display.title: Image Display
image_display.thumbnail_hint: Thumbnail — small preview, click to enlarge
image_display.full_hint: Full — large inline images like Discord

sounds_section.title: Sounds
sounds_section.auto_accept_streams_hint: Automatically open screen shares when someone starts streaming. Turn off to join manually.
sounds_section.hide_voice_panel_hint: Hide the voice users panel on desktop. Voice users are still shown in channel indicators.
sounds_section.sidebar_voice_controls_hint: Show mute/deafen buttons in the sidebar instead of the voice panel header.
sounds_section.sound_manager_hint: Browse sounds, assign to events, set hotkeys

push_section.title: Push Notifications
push_section.hint: Receive notifications even when Haven is closed

plugins_section.title: Plugins & Themes
plugins_section.hint: Drop .plugin.js files into the plugins/ folder and .theme.css files into the themes/ folder, then refresh.

two_factor_section.title: Two-Factor Authentication
two_factor_section.enable_hint: Protect your account with a TOTP authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
two_factor_section.setup_hint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
two_factor_section.backup_hint: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.
two_factor_section.verify_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator

recovery_section.title: Account Recovery
recovery_section.desc: Generate one-time recovery codes to regain access if you forget your password. Store them somewhere safe — they work like a last-resort key.
recovery_section.e2e_warning: Important: Using a recovery code to reset your password will permanently and irreversibly destroy your end-to-end encryption keys. All encrypted direct message history will become unreadable. There is no way to undo this.
recovery_section.save_hint: Save these codes now — they will not be shown again. Each code can only be used once.
recovery_section.no_codes: You have no recovery codes. Generate some now.

delete_account_section.title: Delete Account
delete_account_section.desc: Permanently delete your account. This cannot be undone.

desktop_shortcuts_section.title: Desktop Shortcuts
desktop_shortcuts_section.desc: Global keyboard shortcuts — active even when Haven is in the background. Click a row to rebind, or “Clear” to disable.

desktop_app_section.title: Desktop App
desktop_app_section.start_on_login_hint: Launch Haven Desktop automatically when you log in to your computer.
desktop_app_section.start_hidden_hint: When launching on login, start minimized to the system tray instead of showing the window.
desktop_app_section.minimize_to_tray_hint: Closing the window hides Haven to the system tray instead of quitting.
desktop_app_section.force_sdr_hint: Fix washed-out or over-saturated colors on HDR monitors. Requires restart.

admin.title: Admin
admin.bots_select_hint: Select a bot to edit, or create a new one
admin.save_hint: Changes only apply when you click Save. Close (✕) to cancel.
admin.login_title_hint: Custom title displayed on the login screen below the HAVEN logo.
admin.default_theme_hint: New users see this theme on first visit. They can still pick their own.
admin.update_banner_hint: When enabled, the "update available" banner is only shown to admins
admin.whitelist_hint: When enabled, only pre-approved usernames can register
admin.invite_hint: A single code that adds people to every channel & sub-channel on the server
admin.cleanup_age_hint: Delete messages older than N days (0 = off)
admin.cleanup_size_hint: Trim oldest messages when DB exceeds N MB (0 = off)
admin.max_upload_hint: Maximum file size users can upload (1–2048 MB, default 25)
admin.max_sound_hint: Max soundboard upload size (256–10240 KB, default 1024 / 1 MB)
admin.max_emoji_hint: Max custom emoji upload size (64–1024 KB, default 256)
admin.max_poll_hint: Maximum answer choices per poll (2–25, default 10)
admin.sounds_hint: Upload audio files for custom notification sounds
admin.emojis_hint: Upload images for custom server emojis
admin.emojis_upload_hint: Upload images for custom server emojis (max 256 KB, png/gif/webp). Name must be lowercase, no spaces.
admin.roles_hint: Create and manage roles. Assign roles to users from the user list context menu.
admin.bots_hint: Create and manage webhook bots that can post messages to channels.
admin.import_hint: Import channels and messages from a Discord export file
admin.modmode_hint: Rearrange sidebar sections and snap server/sidebar/status panels
admin.confirm_delete_user: ⚠️ Permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
admin.import_select_channel: Select at least one channel to import.
admin.import_confirm_one:
Import 1 channel with ~{{messages}} messages?

This cannot be undone easily.
admin.import_confirm_other:
Import {{count}} channels with ~{{messages}} messages?

This cannot be undone easily.
admin.import_fetching_one: Fetching 1 channel... This may take a while for large servers.
admin.import_fetching_other: Fetching {{count}} channels... This may take a while for large servers.
admin.roles_level_hint:
Role level (1-99, higher = more authority):
Server Mod default = 50, Channel Mod default = 25
admin.roles_reset_confirm:
Reset all roles to deployment defaults?

This will delete all current roles and re-create the defaults (Server Mod, Channel Mod, User). Existing role assignments will be lost.
admin.roles_reapply_confirm:
Reapply channel access to ALL users with this role?
This will grant configured channels to every user who currently has this role.
admin.roles_delete_confirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? Users with this role will lose it.

role_form.name: Name
role_form.auto_assign_hint: New users will automatically receive this role when they register or join a channel.
role_form.link_channel_access: Link channel access to this role
role_form.link_channel_access_hint: When enabled, assigning/revoking this role will automatically grant/revoke channel memberships.

recovery_notice.title: Account Recovery Codes
recovery_notice.body: You can now generate one-time recovery codes in Settings → 🔑 Recovery. If you ever forget your password, these codes let you reset it — no admin needed.
recovery_notice.warning: Heads up: Using a recovery code resets your password and wipes your E2E encryption keys on other devices. Encrypted DMs will be unreadable on any device you haven't used recently.

wizard.title: Welcome to Haven
wizard.subtitle: Let's get your server ready. This only takes a minute.
wizard.step1_desc: Everything is already running. Here's what was set up automatically:
wizard.server_name_hint: This is what your friends see in their server list.
wizard.step2_desc: Channels are where conversations happen. Create one to get started.
wizard.channel_name_hint: You can create more channels later from the sidebar.
wizard.share_hint: Share this code with friends so they can join this channel.
wizard.step3_desc: Want friends outside your WiFi to connect? Let's check if your server is reachable from the internet.
wizard.lan_only_hint: LAN only? If your friends are on the same WiFi, you can skip this — it will work automatically.
wizard.step4_desc: Haven is running and ready for your friends.
wizard.step_code: Enter the channel invite code you share with them
wizard.tip: Tip: You can always access settings with the ⚙️ gear icon in the sidebar. This wizard won't show again.
wizard.no_channel_created: No channel created (you can create one from the sidebar)
wizard.port_open_summary: Port is open — friends can connect from anywhere
wizard.port_blocked_summary: Port not reachable — check port forwarding for remote access
wizard.port_reachable_title: Your server is reachable from the internet!
wizard.port_fail_title: Port {{port}} is not reachable from the internet.
wizard.port_fail_blocked_ip: Your public IP is {{ip}}, but the port is blocked.
wizard.fix_step_2: Find Port Forwarding (or NAT / Virtual Servers)
wizard.fix_step_3: Forward port {{port}} (TCP) to your PC's local IP
wizard.lan_detail: If friends are on the same WiFi, this doesn't matter — they can connect directly.
wizard.check_failed: Check failed: {{error}}. You may be offline.

code_settings.title: Channel Code Settings
code_settings.visibility_public: Public — everyone can see the code
code_settings.visibility_private: Private — only admins see the code
code_settings.rotation_joins: Join-based — rotate after X new joins

add_server.title: Add a Server
add_server.desc: Connect to a friend's Haven server

edit_profile.title: Edit Profile
edit_profile.avatar_hint: JPG, PNG, GIF (animated!), WebP · Max 2 MB
edit_profile.display_name_desc: Letters, numbers, underscores, and spaces (2–20 chars)

admin_action.title: Moderate User
admin_action.scrub_hint: Removes the user's messages (archived/protected messages are preserved)
admin_action.desc_kick: This user will be removed from the current channel.
admin_action.desc_ban: This user will be permanently banned until unbanned.
admin_action.desc_mute: This user won't be able to send messages for the specified duration.
admin_action.desc_delete_user: This will permanently delete this user's account and free their username.

dm_organize.title: Organize DMs
dm_organize.desc: Tag your conversations into collapsible categories

poll.title: Create Poll
poll.question_placeholder: What do you want to ask?

sub_panel.title: Sub-channel Subscriptions
sub_panel.desc: Subscribe to get notifications. Unsubscribed channels still appear but won't notify you.

create_sub.title: Create Sub-channel
create_sub.admin_note: Admins always have access to all channels, including private ones.

webhook.title: Webhooks
webhook.token_warning: Copy this URL now — you won't see the full token again!

push_error.title: Push Notifications Unavailable
push_error.recommendation:
Recommended: Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, or Opera on desktop.
iOS requires Safari 16.4+ with Haven added to your Home Screen.

e2e_password.title: Password Required
e2e_password.desc: End-to-end encryption requires your password to unlock your keys. Enter your account password to continue.

e2e_verify.desc: Compare this safety number with {{name}} using another channel (in person, phone call, text, etc.). If they match, your conversation is end-to-end encrypted and no one is intercepting.

e2e_reset.warning_irreversible: This action is irreversible. Resetting your encryption keys will:
e2e_reset.li_new_keys: Generate a completely new key pair
e2e_reset.li_unreadable: Make ALL previous encrypted DM messages permanently unreadable — for both you and the person you were talking to
e2e_reset.li_reverify: Require your DM partners to re-verify encryption with you
e2e_reset.warning_permanent: This cannot be undone. There is no recovery. The messages are gone forever.

android_beta.title: Amni-Haven Android
android_beta.subtitle: A native Android app for Haven, built from the ground up by Amnibro!
android_beta.feature_built: Built from the ground up for Haven
android_beta.credit: Built with ❤️ by Amnibro — thank you for your incredible work on the Amni-Haven Android app!

donors.title: Thank You
donors.subtitle: Haven is built with love and kept alive by the generosity of people like you. Every donation — big or small — means the world.
donors.note: New donors will be added each release. If you've donated and don't see your name, it'll be in the next update!

listen_together.title: Listen Together
listen_together.desc: Paste a link from Spotify, YouTube, or SoundCloud to share with everyone in voice

manage_servers.title: Manage Servers
manage_servers.desc: Edit or remove your linked servers

sound_manager.title: Sound Manager
sound_manager.modal_hint: Browse & play custom sounds. Set hotkeys to play them anytime.
sound_manager.assign_hint: Choose which sound plays for each event. Custom sounds uploaded by the admin appear here too.
sound_manager.upload_hint: Upload audio files for custom sounds (max 1 MB each, mp3/ogg/wav/webm)

emoji_crop.title: Crop Emoji
emoji_crop.hint: Drag to reposition · Slider to zoom

assign_role.title: Assign Role
assign_role.scope_hint: Server-wide applies to all channels. Channel-specific only applies within that channel.

role_assign_center.title: Role Assignment
role_assign_center.subtitle: Select a user, then a channel, then configure their role.

transfer_admin.title: Transfer Admin
transfer_admin.warning: This will make {{username}} the new server Admin and demote you to Former Admin (Lv.99).
transfer_admin.note: This action cannot be undone by you.

bot_mgmt.title: Bot Management
bot_mgmt.select_or_create: Select a bot to edit, or create a new one

discord_import.title: Import from Discord
discord_import.pick_server: Pick a server to import from:
discord_import.preview_select_hint: Select channels to import. You can rename them before importing.
discord_import.upload_hint: Upload a Discord export file to import channels and messages into Haven.
discord_import.format_dce: — JSON or ZIP (recommended — includes all users)
discord_import.format_ddp: — ZIP from Settings → Privacy (your messages only)
discord_import.connect_hint: Connect directly to Discord and pull your messages — no external tools needed.
discord_import.token_help_summary: How do I get my Discord token?
discord_import.token_step_1: Open discord.com/app in Chrome/Edge (or use the desktop app)
discord_import.token_step_3: Click the Application tab (click >> in the toolbar if you don't see it)
discord_import.token_step_4: In the left sidebar, expand Local Storage → click https://discord.com
discord_import.token_step_5: Find the token key — copy the value (without the quotes)
discord_import.desktop_app_hint: Desktop app: If F12 doesn't open DevTools, close Discord fully, then edit:
discord_import.add_line_hint: Add this line anywhere inside the { }:
discord_import.restart_hint: Restart Discord, then follow the steps above.
discord_import.token_warning: Your token is like a password. Haven uses it only for this import and never stores it.

channel_functions.voice_hint: Enable or disable voice chat in this channel
channel_functions.text_hint: Enable or disable text chat in this channel
channel_functions.streams_hint: Allow screen sharing and camera (requires voice)
channel_functions.music_hint: Allow Listen Together / music playback (requires voice)
channel_functions.media_hint: Allow image, video, and file uploads in this channel
channel_functions.slow_mode_hint: Require a cooldown between messages (0 = off)
channel_functions.cleanup_guard_hint: Protect this channel from automatic message cleanup
channel_functions.voice_limit_hint: Limit simultaneous voice users (click to set; blank = unlimited)
channel_functions.voice_bitrate_hint: Cap voice audio bitrate in kbps (0 = auto / no cap)
channel_functions.self_destruct_hint: Set a self-destruct timer — channel auto-deletes after the specified hours (0 = off)
channel_functions.announcement_hint: Announcement channel — messages use a distinct notification sound and gold highlight
channel_functions.afk_sub_hint: Designate a sub-channel as the AFK voice room — idle users are moved here
channel_functions.afk_timeout_hint: Minutes of voice inactivity before moving to AFK sub (0 = disabled)

confirm.delete_channel:
Delete this channel?
All messages will be permanently lost.
confirm.delete_channel_sure:
Are you ABSOLUTELY sure?
This action cannot be undone!
confirm.leave_channel:
Leave channel "{{name}}"?
You'll need the channel code to rejoin.
confirm.delete_user: Are you SURE you want to delete {{username}}? This cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_account: Are you ABSOLUTELY sure? Your account will be gone forever.
confirm.clear_invite_code: Clear the server invite code? Anyone with the old code won't be able to use it.
confirm.rotate_channel_code: Rotate the channel code now? Current code will become invalid.

emoji.customize_quick_hint: Click a slot, then pick an emoji to replace it.

setup.title: Set Up GIF Search
setup.powered_by: GIF search is powered by GIPHY and needs a free API key.
setup.step_5: Copy the API key and paste it below
setup.note: No payment required — GIPHY's free tier is generous enough for a private server.
setup.unavailable_desc: An admin needs to set up the GIPHY API key before GIF search can work.
